titleStmt.title: SII 9.448: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 448. (A.R. No. 407 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1363, Ḍurmati, Phālguṇa, śu. 10, Ma[ṅgaḷavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1442 February 20 Tuesday, in the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Kōṭiyaṇṇa-Seṭṭi made a gift of land for the service of the god Mahādēva at Paḍuvakēri of Basarūru, when the Mahāpradhāna Chandarasa-Voḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under the orders of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīsarasvatyayē namaḥ śrīgurubhyō namaḥ Avighnamastu
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1363 neya
durmmati saṁ . phālguṇa śu 10 maṁ lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyarū vijayanagarada divyasiṁ
hāsanadali sakaḷasā(ṁ)mrājyavanū cittaisutiha kāladali Avara nirūpadi
ṁda śrīmanmahāpradhāna caṁdarasavoḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū pratipāli
sutiha kāladalli morataṁkeya saniyamaseṭṭiyaḷiya kōṭiyaṁṇaseṭṭi ba
rasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare basuṟūra paḍuvakēriya mahādēvara
saṁnidhiyali māḍida dharmada vivara rudrapūje yibbaru dīvaḷigeya habbada
li raṁgapūje 1 sāṇeya sahasrakke Akki mu 1 . yidake biṭṭa bāḷu teṁka kayipā
ḍiyoḷage tānu baddhabrahmadāyada mūlada bāḷina catuḥsīme vivara mūḍalu
hoḷeIndaṁ paḍuva . teṁka . cōḷiyakeyya halara gaḍiIṁ baḍaga paḍuva
samudradiṁ . mūḍa . baḍaga beṁmaṇabhaṁḍāriya gaḍiIṁ teṁka Intī catuḥsī
meyoḷagaṇa bāḷanū teṁgina tōṭavanū nityake biṭṭenu �yo bāḷa bēṭara gēṇi bhattanū nā
gaṁḍeyalū ¥ 2 Anyanūra I śāsanadali baradidda dharmmavanu kālakālake naḍasi bahenu
naḍasade 1 kāla Uḷidare . kritavanikkideneṁdu hēḷade �yo bāḷanu tōṭavanu biḍuvenu
Ākarta biḍaleya baḷiya morataṁkeya kōṭiseṭṭiya suhastada Oppa saṁjōḍi
ya brahmaru Ātana Aḷiyaṁdira saṁbaṁda �yo dhar(ṁ)mavanū Ā kōṭiseṭṭi naḍasibahanu
Ātaniṁda baḷika Aḷiyaṁdiru naḍasibaharu Āta māḍida dharmmavanū Ātananū Ā kōṭise
ṭṭiya kuṭuṁbavanū paḍuvakēryya halaru seṭṭikāṟaru pālisibaharu halaru seṭṭi
kārara suhastada Oppa śrīsahādēviya Ā kōṭiseṭi kōṭiseṭiya kuṭuṁbake [�yo]
bāḷanū tōṭavanū hiḍidu bittuva gēṇikārarū voppāne tuppavanū kālakālake naḍa
si baharu . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pā
lanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śaṁkarasagaḷa baraha maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.448 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
